role_summary: the statutory audit manager leads statutory audit engagements and ensures that financial  statements comply with applicable laws and accounting standards.
responsibilities: • plan and manage statutory au dits under companies act and other laws   • supervise audit teams and review audit working papers   • ensure compliance with ind as / ifrs and auditing standards   • identify audit risks and control weaknesses   • finalize audit reports and audit opinions   • liaise with clie nts, management, and auditors
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • strong statutory audit and reporting experience   • leadership and client -handling skills
